author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Multimedia Project 'Heavily Armed High School Girls' Gets TV Anime Adaptation in 2027
Good Smile Company announced a television anime adaptation of illustrator neco's Juu Heisougata Joshikousei (Heavily Armed High School Girls) multimedia franchise on Friday, revealing the main staff, a brand new visual (pictured), and the teaser promotional video. The anime series will premiere in 2027. Masaki Tachibana (Barakamon, Princess Principal) is serving as the director, with Natsuko Takahashi (Tokyo Magnitude 8.0, Ore Monogatari!!) handling the series composition. Good Smile Film a...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Buchigire Reijou wa Houfuku wo Chikaimashita.' Unveils Additional Cast, Staff, First Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Metabo Hagure's Buchigire Reijou wa Houfuku wo Chikaimashita. Madousho no Chikara de Sokoku wo Tatakitsubushimasu (A Livid Lady's Guide to Getting Even: How I Crushed My Homeland with My Mighty Grimoires) light novel unveiled additional cast, staff, and the first promotional video on Friday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on July 6 at 10:30 p.m. on TV Tokyo, BS11, AT-X, and other channels in July 2026. Voice actress...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Hell Mode 2nd Season' Unveiled Supporting Cast Pair, Opening Theme, Main Promo
The official website of the Hell Mode: Yarikomizuki no Gamer wa Hai Settei no Isekai de Musou suru 2nd Season (Hell Mode: The Hardcore Gamer Dominates in Another World with Garbage Balancing Season 2) television anime unveiled an additional pair of cast, opening theme, and the main promotional video on Friday. The second season adapting Hamuo's action fantasy light novel will begin airing on Tokyo MX at 1:00 a.m. on July 4, followed by broadcasts on MBS, AT-X, and BS Nippon Television. Voic...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Magic Knight Rayearth' Announces Additional Cast
The official website for the new Magic Knight Rayearth (Mahou Kishi Rayearth) television anime announced additional cast members on Friday. The anime adapting CLAMP's mahou shoujo manga is scheduled to premiere on TV Asahi's "IMAnimation W" frame at 11.45 p.m. in October 2026. Cast Emeraude: Saori Hayami (Kimetsu no Yaiba) Zagato: Yuuki Ono (Beastars) Mokona: Mika Kikuchi (Tsubasa Chronicle) Yui Umemoto (Ninja Kamui) is directing at E&H Production. author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'World Is Dancing' Reveals Additional Cast, Second Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Kazuto Mihara's World Is Dancing manga revealed additional cast, a character visual (pictured above), and the second promotional video on Friday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on July 2 at 10:00 p.m. on Tokyo MX and KBS Kyoto, followed by BS Asahi, Sun TV, and other stations. Voice actors Youji Matsuda (Mononoke Hime) and Miyuki Sawashiro (Ikoku Nikki) are joining the cast as Ineou and Shirabyoushi, respectively. Toshi...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Mahouka Koukou no Rettousei' Part 2 in Production
The official website of the Mahouka Koukou no Rettousei (The Irregular at Magic High School) anime series announced on Friday that a second part is in production, revealing a teaser visual (pictured). Madhouse produced the first anime season adapting Tsutomu Satou's action sci-fi light novel debuted in 26 episodes in Spring 2014. The Hoshi wo Yobu Shoujo (The Girl Who Summons The Stars) anime movie by 8bit opened in Japan in June 2017. The Raihousha-hen (Visitor Arc) television anime aired...
